## What the Science Actually Shows

Based on peer-reviewed literature, here's what's established vs. what's still uncertain:

### **Established Findings (Replicated Across Studies)**

1. **Calcium Leak is Real**: RyR2 channels in AD brains undergo post-translational modifications (phosphorylation, oxidation, nitrosylation) that make them "leaky," releasing excess calcium from the endoplasmic reticulum into neurons [[1](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28631094/), [8](https://molecularneurodegeneration.biomedcentral.org/articles/10.1186/1750-1326-9-21)]
